channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: England And Argentina Will Share Host City At 2026 World Cup
item.description: England have picked Kansas City as the World Cup base, sharing the city with Argentina, who also based themselves in the city.

item.title: Mick Cronin 'Really Hoping' Tom Izzo Buys Him Dinner When UCLA Visits Michigan State
item.description: Mick Cronin is looking forward to grabbing dinner with Tom Izzo when UCLA visits Michigan State next week.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Daytona 500 Qualifying: Kyle Busch Wins His First Daytona 500 Pole
item.description: Kyle Busch won his first Daytona 500 pole with the fastest driver in qualifying. FOX Sports' Bob Pockrass breaks it down.

item.title: Buzz Williams, Maryland Upset Iowa
item.description: Maryland upset Iowa on Wednesday night to snap the Hawkeyes’ six-game win streak.

item.title: Michigan Rallies In the 2nd Half To Avoid Upset Loss To Northwestern
item.description: Michigan uses second-half surge to avoid upset loss to Northwestern.

item.title: UK PM demands apology from 'offensive' Ratcliffe
item.description: Several Manchester United supporters groups condemned comments made by co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe after the British billionaire said the U.K. has been...

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Chelsea eye move for Álvarez
item.description: The two major London clubs are linked with a move with Atlético Madrid's Julián Álvarez. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Women's Power Rankings: A big week for the top of the Big 12
item.description: Baylor, up five spots in our rankings, is once again atop the Big 12, with WVU, Texas Tech and TCU not far behind.

item.title: K-State coach rips team: Don't deserve to be here
item.description: In a brief but tense postgame news conference, Kansas State coach Jerome Tang questioned his team's pride after a 91-62 loss to Cincinnati, saying, "T...

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Virginia Tech gets biggest victory yet with Clemson upset
item.description: Another ranked upset adds more intrigue to the race for the NCAA tournament.
